title_en: GST/QST — Goods and Services Tax / Quebec Sales Tax

GST.small_supplier_rule_en: If your worldwide taxable revenues are under $30,000 in the last four consecutive quarters, you are a small supplier and registration is optional.

input_tax_credits.description_en: Registrants can claim input tax credits (ITCs) on the GST paid on business expenses to recover tax paid on inputs.

quick_method.description_en: Small businesses with revenues under $400,000 may use the Quick Method to simplify GST/QST remittances by applying a flat remittance rate instead of tracking all ITCs.
